title: A Letter from Another Country
content: While traveling abroad, Olivia developed a habit that seemed old-fashioned to many people. Instead of posting updates online, she wrote letters. One rainy afternoon, she sat in a small café overlooking a river and filled several pages describing her experiences. She wrote about unfamiliar streets, conversations with strangers, and the emotions that accompanied being far from home. The letter was addressed to her grandmother, who had inspired her love of travel years earlier. Weeks later, long after the trip had ended, Olivia received a reply. Reading it reminded her that meaningful communication often required more patience and intention than the quick messages that dominated modern life.
